Uses of Package
io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.partition

Packages that use io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.partition
Package
Description
io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.api
User-facing extension points for building cluster-aware partitioned jobs.
io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.autoconfigure
Spring Boot auto-configuration and the configuration-property surface for clustering.
io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.partition
Master-side partitioning.
io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.partition.impl
Built-in partition-assignment strategies: round-robin, fixed-node-count, and least-loaded.

    Description
    PartitionTransferableProp
     
  • Classes in io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.partition used by io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.autoconfigure
    Class
    Description
    ClusterAwarePartitionHandler
    A custom PartitionHandler that coordinates partition execution across a dynamic cluster of Spring Batch nodes using a shared relational database for metadata synchronization.
  • Classes in io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.partition used by io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.partition
    Class
    Description
    PartitionAssignment
     
    PartitionAssignmentStrategy
    Maps work units onto the currently live cluster nodes.
    PartitioningMode
     
    PartitionStatus
    Lifecycle states of a single partition row in BATCH_PARTITIONS.
